scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace=@lumina/config && npm run build --workspace=@lumina/types
scripts.build:apps: npm run build --workspace=@lumina/api && npm run build --workspace=@lumina/stellar-service && npm run build --workspace=@lumina/mobile && npm run build --workspace=@lumina/web
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
